error_signature: 404 Not Found error when loading the form
title: Incorrect webhook URL configuration causing 404 error
symptom: The form node generates a URL that results in a 404 Not Found error when accessed. This happens due to an incorrect URL format.
not_this_if: Webhook URL is correctly set with https:// protocol
root_cause: The webhook URL is incorrectly formed because it lacks the proper protocol and host configuration. This leads to n8n generating an invalid URL that cannot be resolved, resulting in a 404 error when trying to access the form.
fix_steps: Update the n8n Docker configuration to set N8N_PROTOCOL to 'https'.
Specify N8N_HOST as the ngrok domain without the protocol.
Set WEBHOOK_TUNNEL_URL and N8N_EDITOR_BASE_URL to the ngrok URL.
agent_instruction: Update the n8n Docker configuration with the correct webhook settings and restart the container.
